context_note: Close the loop: a phone-initiated A2A board ticket (concierge Confirm вЖТ assign_task to the orchestrator) is autonomously picked up and worked by the mesh as an AGENT TEAM and finally resolved, with status updates shown live on BOTH the phone PWA and the desktop dashboard. Design (spec 2026-06-22 orchestrator-board-pipeline): the orchestrator is the TEAM LEAD that owns its own board ticket; a thin daemon-scheduled board-drive delegate job triggers it; the orchestrator runs a CONDUCTOR WORKFLOW + PARALLEL FAN-OUT (owner-chosen, NOT a swarm) вАФ dependency-ordered stages (e.g. analyst approach вЖТ coder plan) with fanOutToPeers where independent (tester/reviewer/security in parallel) вАФ synthesizes, and advances its own ticket assignedвЖТacknowledgedвЖТin-progressвЖТdone. Ask-only this round (specialists read-only; do-mode is deferred). Status: the Task Board (phone Tasks tab + desktop #view-tasks) auto-refreshes the ticket lifecycle, and the desktop graph view shows the live team A2A edges. Builds on the shipped concierge agent + A2A Task Board view. The work itself is LLM-agent behavior, verified live; code is wiring + prompts + auto-refresh, no swarm runtime.

dimensions.label: Phone initiates вЖТ mesh autonomously picks up
dimensions.descriptor: From the phone, an A2A task is created (concierge вЖТ board ticket to the orchestrator) and the mesh picks it up on its own (the daemon-triggered orchestrator), with no human running an agent session. The loop starts and is claimed autonomously.

dimensions.label: Worked by an agent TEAM (conductor workflow + parallel fan-out)
dimensions.descriptor: The orchestrator works the task as a coordinated TEAM вАФ not a single hand-off to one agent. It pulls in the right multiple specialists, ordering dependent stages and fanning out independent ones in parallel, then synthesizes. A real task (e.g. a code change) visibly involves several agents collaborating, with the orchestrator as conductor.

dimensions.label: Ultimately resolved
dimensions.descriptor: The task actually reaches resolution вАФ the ticket advances to done with a concrete synthesized result, not left stuck. The owner gets an answer/outcome, not just motion.

dimensions.label: Live status updates on phone AND desktop
dimensions.descriptor: Both surfaces show the status updating without manual reload: the Task Board (phone Tasks tab + desktop view) reflects the ticket moving assignedвЖТacknowledgedвЖТin-progressвЖТdone, and the desktop also surfaces the team's live activity (graph edges / activity). The owner can watch progress from either device.

dimensions.label: Safe + agent-driven
dimensions.descriptor: Ask-only end to end (no autonomous repo writes); board invariant intact (orchestrator advances only its own ticket; identity framework-set); the daemon is a thin trigger while the agent does the reasoning/coordination; onward delegation stays within the depth guard. No new public exposure; dashboard stays bound + token-gated.

dimensions.label: End-to-end verified on the real device
dimensions.descriptor: Demonstrated on the actual Mac+phone, not just merged code: a phone-created task is observed being picked up, worked by the team, and resolved, with the status visibly updating on both the phone and desktop. Confirmed, not asserted.
